claim_boundary: Cadence-price coefficients are associations. Same-snapshot price changes are not ordered. The reaction mechanism is not promoted because the frozen design has only two independent waves, no slow-initiator response comparisons, and only two predictive model clusters.

timing_identification.estimand: share of price events causally responding to their unique most-recent strictly prior named rival within 72 hours

source: corrected-b389923-r2 manuscript_vintages frozen_9d release; metrics are rounded publication copies
